title: InSituVane
description: InSituVane: A representation of an in-situ vane test defined by the borehole where the test was carried out and the result.

Id.description: Location identifier relating the borehole to the test (LOCA_ID).

Top.description: Depth to the top of the sample, measured from the top of the borehole (IVAN_DEPTH). Property has a quantity of type Length meassured in [m].

Properties.description: A list of different properties including references, tests, analysis, results and detection.

Result.description: Vane Test Result (IVAN_IVAN). Property has a quantity of type Pressure meassured in [Pa].

_t.description: Optional Type discirminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
